title: Khanom Krok with Cherries
description: A sweet Thai dessert featuring crispy khanom krok pancakes with a cherry compote.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine rice flour and sugar.
Gradually add in coconut milk and water, whisking until smooth.
Crack in tender eggs and whisk until well combined.
Heat a non-stick pan or khanom krok pan over medium heat.
Pour in batter and cook until edges start to curl.
Flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare cherry compote by cooking cherries in a saucepan over low heat.
Serve warm khanom krok with cherry compote.
